subcodes.first_line: O handmaid of God! The glance of God is fixed upon thee, and from His all-encompassing mercy and His pre-existent grace, in this Most Manifest Prison [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای امه الله طرف الله بتو ناظر و از رحمت محیطه و عنایت سابقه در این سجن مبین
subcodes.subjects: @personal instructions, @praise and encouragement, @knowledge; recognition of God
